requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 and Nepal's Mixed GB/T Reality
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2及尼泊尔GB/T混合现实
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2及尼泊爾GB/T混合現實

summary.en: Nepal does not appear from official public sources to have a single published national EV connector mandate as of 2026-06-14, so connector requirements are driven by NBSM conformity review, NEA/project specifications, the vehicle fleet being served, and charge-point-operator requirements. IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC are the internationally aligned options commonly specified for IEC-based projects. Nepal also has a visible GB/T presence because many EVs and chargers are imported from China. This mixed reality means exporters must not assume either GB/T or CCS2 suitability without confirming the vehicle fleet and project specification.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认尼泊尔已发布单一全国EV接口强制规定，因此接口要求由NBSM合格评定审查、NEA/项目规格、服务车辆车型及充电点运营商要求共同决定。IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流是IEC体系项目常用的国际化配置。由于大量EV和充电设备从中国进口，尼泊尔也存在明显GB/T接口现实。这种混合情况意味着出口商不得在未确认车辆群和项目规格前假设GB/T或CCS2均适用。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認尼泊爾已發布單一全國EV接口強制規定，因此接口要求由NBSM合格評定審查、NEA/項目規格、服務車輛車型及充電點運營商要求共同決定。IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流是IEC體系項目常用的國際化配置。由於大量EV和充電設備從中國進口，尼泊爾也存在明顯GB/T接口現實。這種混合情況意味著出口商不得在未確認車輛群和項目規格前假設GB/T或CCS2均適用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Type 2 AC coupler dimensional compatibility and interchangeability
IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / Combo 2 DC and AC/DC vehicle coupler configurations
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
NBSM / project specification review for connector configuration

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and IEC Type 2 look superficially similar but differ in gender arrangement, contact configuration, and signaling details. GB/T DC is geometrically and electrically different from CCS2 and uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication. GB/T hardware therefore cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vehicle inlets and cannot serve those deployments without connector and communication redesign.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流与IEC Type 2外观相似但在接口性别、触点配置和信号细节上不同。GB/T直流与CCS2在几何形状和电气层面不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信。因此GB/T硬件无法插入IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2车辆接口，也无法在不进行接口和通信重新设计的情况下服务这类部署。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流與IEC Type 2外觀相似但在接口性別、觸點配置和信號細節上不同。GB/T直流與CCS2在幾何形狀和電氣層面不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。因此GB/T硬體無法插入IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2車輛接口，也無法在不進行接口和通訊重新設計的情況下服務這類部署。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to battery management system communication

gap.en: For IEC 62196 / CCS2 projects, conversion from a China GB/T-only charger requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot circuits, DC communication stack, labels, thermal-rise evidence, spare parts, and service documentation. For GB/T fleet projects in Nepal, exporters still need NBSM and project acceptance for the product and installation. Adapters should not be treated as a conformity substitute unless the project owner and competent authority explicitly accept them.
gap.zh: 对于IEC 62196 / CCS2项目，仅支持中国GB/T的充电桩转换需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引电路、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据、备件和服务文件。对于尼泊尔GB/T车型项目，出口商仍须取得产品和安装层面的NBSM及项目接受。除非项目业主和主管机关明确接受，转接器不应视为合规替代方案。
gap.zht: 對於IEC 62196 / CCS2項目，僅支持中國GB/T的充電樁轉換需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引電路、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據、備件和服務文件。對於尼泊爾GB/T車型項目，出口商仍須取得產品和安裝層面的NBSM及項目接受。除非項目業主和主管機關明確接受，轉接器不應視為合規替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is mandatory where required by NBSM review, NEA-connected project specification, tender, charge-point operator, or vehicle fleet; Nepal's GB/T presence must be verified case by case
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal connector planning must be project- and fleet-specific. GB/T is present because Chinese EVs are common, but IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 alignment requires hardware and protocol changes; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔接口规划必须按项目和车辆群确认。由于中国EV常见，GB/T接口确实存在；但若要适配IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，则需要硬件和协议变更，GB/T接口与Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理上不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾接口規劃必須按項目和車輛群確認。由於中國EV常見，GB/T接口確實存在；但若要適配IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2，則需要硬體和協議變更，GB/T接口與Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理上不兼容。
